song.title: O to Be Like Thee
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O to be like Thee! blessed Redeemer; This is my constant longing and prayer; Gladly I’ll forfeit all of earth’s treasures, Jesus, Thy perfect likeness to wear.
[C] Chorus O to be like Thee! O to be like Thee! Blessed Redeemer, Pure as Thou art;|| Come in Thy sweetness, Come in Thy fullness; Stamp Thine own image Deep on my heart.
[V2] 2) O to be like Thee! full of compassion, Loving, forgiving, tender and kind, Helping the helpless, cheering the fainting, Seeking the wand’ring sinner to find.
[V3] 3) O to be like Thee! lowly in spirit, Holy and harmless, patient and brave; Meekly enduring cruel reproaches, Willing to suffer, others to save.
[V4] 4) O to be like Thee! Lord, I am coming Now to receive th’ anointing divine; All that I am and have I am bringing, Lord, from this moment all shall be Thine!
[V5] 5) O to be like Thee! While I am pleading, Pour out Thy Spirit, fill with Thy love. Make me a temple meet for Thy dwelling, Fit me for life and heaven above.
song.author: Thomas O Chisholm
